name: avoma-sdk
description: Typed TypeScript SDK for the Avoma API.

scripts.generate:types: bun run scripts/normalize-openapi.ts && bunx openapi-typescript .generated/openapi.normalized.yml -o src/generated/avoma.openapi.ts
scripts.build: bun run generate:types && tsup index.ts --format esm --dts --target es2020 --clean --out-dir dist
scripts.check: bun run generate:types && bun run typecheck && bun run build
